prs.title: Support multi-environment AWS connector deployments
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Spans 12 files across infra config, AWS CloudFormation, server actions, credential providers, and UI components to support multi-environment connector deployments — significant feature with cross-cutting changes.

prs.title: Accept API key from query param for hubspot.fetch compatibility
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line change to accept an API key from a query parameter in one route file.

prs.title: Remove skematic-hubspot-connector — extracted to own repo
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Extraction of a connector to its own repo with only a .gitignore update and minor route touch as the meaningful custom additions — essentially housekeeping.

prs.title: Add portfolio-aware company context for chat
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 182 lines across 8 files touching the chat agent, prompts, DAL, field progress, layout, and hook to introduce portfolio-aware company context — a solid, cross-cutting feature addition.

prs.title: ACE review: editable customer fields, improved reset & validator
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Over 12,800 lines across 109 files touching AI agents, sub-agents, state, tools, schema migrations, UI components, actions, and infra config — a transformative, multi-week epic covering editable customer fields, reset logic, validator improvements, and much more.

prs.title: Propagate portfolioId to chat agent
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 36 lines across 3 files to thread a portfolioId through the chat agent route and sidebar — small, focused plumbing change.

prs.title: Move TLS env var to docker entrypoint
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Three-line change moving a TLS env var into the docker entrypoint across two config files and the entrypoint script.

prs.title: Set NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 in App Runner
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Two-line config addition setting NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED in two App Runner YAML files.

prs.title: Fix staging TLS: use instrumentation.ts for global SSL bypass
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Five lines across two files to implement a global SSL bypass via instrumentation.ts for staging — small but deliberate architectural placement.

prs.title: Fix TLS bypass for staging in chat agent route
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line fix to the chat agent route for a TLS bypass on staging.

prs.title: Add product badges to outcomes, fix outcome linking and staging SSL
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 34 lines across 8 files adding product badges to outcomes, fixing outcome linking, and addressing staging SSL — modest but multi-touch feature and bug fix.

prs.title: Conditional rename of RivalProductComparison index
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 23 lines in two migration files to conditionally rename a database index — small schema fix with some conditional logic.

prs.title: Suggest Playbook tool, milestone UX fixes, Task Details rename (SM-513)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 320 lines across 11 files adding a Suggest Playbook tool, milestone UX fixes, Task Details renaming, and Gantt/hierarchy editor changes — a significant cross-cutting feature touching AI tooling, admin UI, and task components.

prs.title: fix: remove Contact Support from user menu (SM-516)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Zero net additions — removal of a single menu item from the user menu, trivial UI change.

stories.name: ACE Customer Review Experience Overhaul
stories.rationale: Delivered a major upgrade to the ACE review workflow with editable customer fields, improved reset behavior, and enhanced validation.

stories.name: Portfolio-Aware AI Chat for Companies
stories.rationale: Enhanced the chat agent to understand portfolio context by adding company-level awareness and propagating portfolioId through the chat pipeline.

stories.name: Playbook Suggestions & Milestone UX Improvements
stories.rationale: Introduced a Suggest Playbook tool, fixed milestone UX issues, and renamed Task Details to improve the guided workflow experience.

stories.name: Fix Staging TLS/SSL Connectivity Issues
stories.rationale: Resolved TLS/SSL bypass problems across staging environments by applying fixes in the chat agent route, App Runner config, docker entrypoint, and instrumentation layer.

stories.name: Multi-Environment AWS Connector Support
stories.rationale: Enabled AWS connector deployments to support multiple environments, improving infrastructure flexibility and scalability.

stories.name: HubSpot Connector Extraction & API Compatibility
stories.rationale: Extracted the HubSpot connector into its own repository and added query parameter API key support to maintain fetch compatibility.

stories.name: Product Badges on Outcomes & Outcome Linking Fixes
stories.rationale: Added product badges to outcomes and fixed outcome linking behavior to improve clarity and navigation in the product interface.

stories.name: Rival Product Comparison Index Migration
stories.rationale: Added a conditional rename of the RivalProductComparison index to safely handle schema migration across environments.

stories.name: Remove Contact Support from User Menu
stories.rationale: Removed the Contact Support option from the user menu to streamline the navigation experience.
